ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 5 FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE MATTER SETTLED; JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT MICHAEL D. LITTLE; STAYED IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH TERMS OF SETTLEMENT. TRIAL DATE VACATED. JUDGMENT TO BE PREPARED AND SUBMITTED TO DEFENDANT FOR HIS APPROVAL.
